---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new V3 step, engine capability, or webapp improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What's missing or awkward today, and why it matters for the demo.

## Proposed change

What you'd like to see. If it's a new `sql/demo.sql` step, say which V3 feature
it shows off.

## Which engine or layer

- Spark batch / Flink streaming / webapp / Terraform / catalog (Lakekeeper) /
  docs

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to get there, and why this one fits a teaching demo. See
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for what tends to fit.
